_description: Synthetic test cases modeled on production patterns observed 2026-04-09
_note: All IDs and IPs are synthetic. Relationships and signal patterns match real production cases.

false_positives.description: T-Mobile CGNAT (AS21928). Two unrelated users linked by shared T-Mobile IP + commodity Quest 2 profile + unknown HMD serial.
false_positives.reason: All shared items are weak signals: CGNAT IP (T-Mobile AS21928), commodity Quest 2 profile, unknown HMD serial

false_positives.description: Two users linked solely by a shared AT&T IP address. No other signals.
false_positives.reason: Single shared IP on AT&T. Even if not flagged as CGNAT ASN, this is an IP-only link with no corroborating signals.

false_positives.description: Vodafone Germany (AS3209). Two users sharing many IPs from dynamic IP pool + commodity Quest 2 profile + unknown HMD.
false_positives.reason: All IPs are from Vodafone dynamic pool. Commodity Quest 2 profile and unknown HMD serial are weak signals. Needs AS3209 added to CGNAT ASN list.

false_positives.description: Two unrelated users who share IP + Quest 3 profile + unknown HMD but NOT the same XPID.
false_positives.reason: Shared AT&T IP + commodity Quest 3 profile + unknown HMD. No XPID match. All weak signals.

true_positives.description: Multi-account cluster. All accounts share the same XPID — same physical Quest device, same person creating many accounts.
true_positives.reason: Shares XPID (strong signal) — same physical device. IP and profile are also shared but the XPID alone is sufficient to maintain the link.

7018.name: ATT-INTERNET4
7018.is_cgnat: partial — mobile CGNAT, residential is not
